pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh:12 specify this exact filename
setup_task.sh:8 creates directory, setup_task.sh:12 defines target path
Task description specifies masthead (title) as 'The Independence Gazette'
Task description specifies dateline as 'Philadelphia, July 5, 1776'
Task description specifies dateline as 'Philadelphia, July 5, 1776'
Task description specifies main headline as 'Independence Declared!'
Task description specifies byline as 'By Benjamin Harris'
Task description requires article body to mention 'Continental Congress'
Task description specifies sidebar headline as 'King George Responds'
Task description specifies Page 2 title as 'Your Assignment'
Task description explicitly states 'Create a 2-page flipchart'
Task description requires at least 2 vertical lines/rectangles on Page 1 (column dividers) plus 1 rectangle on Page 2 (border/highlight box) = 3 minimum

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic 2-page ActivInspire flipchart titled 'The Independence Gazette' with fictional content about American independence dated Philadelphia, July 5, 1776. Page 1 requires a masthead, dateline, headline 'Independence Declared', byline crediting Benjamin Harris, body text mentioning Continental Congress, and a sidebar about King George with at least 2 column-divider shapes (lines or rectangles). Page 2 must include an 'Assignment' title with an instruction box (rectangle shape). Total minimum 3 shapes required. File saved as 'independence_gazette.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/.
